creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
This port provides Mexican Spanish voices for Festival. It depends on the
festival port (ports/21182). This is based on the NetBSD port.  Please
retain the line saying so, and the $NetBSD$ RCS tags, when committing it.

Fix: 

http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/festogi-spanish.shar
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
